question_text: Why did you choose to study in the UK instead of studying in Nigeria or going to countries like Canada or the US?
intent: Check researched motivation and genuine student intent.
follow_up_hint: Ask which other countries they considered and what they found about UK universities.
example_points: Mention UK course length, teaching style, reputation, and why these matter beyond migration hype.

question_text: How does this course relate to what you studied previously or to your current work in Nigeria?
intent: Test academic progression and avoid level-hopping.
follow_up_hint: If they already have a degree, ask why this is not repeating the same level.
example_points: Connect modules to Nigerian degree or job role and show progression.

question_text: Who is sponsoring your studies, what do they do for a living, and roughly how much do they earn in a year?
intent: Confirm realistic sponsor income against bank statements.
follow_up_hint: Ask where the money is kept and how long it has been in the account.
example_points: Sponsor occupation, approximate annual income, savings history, and link to bank statement balance.

question_text: Your tuition and living costs are in pounds. How did you and your sponsor calculate the total cost in naira for the whole course?
intent: Check realistic cost planning in a volatile FX context.
follow_up_hint: Probe how they allowed for exchange rate changes and bank charges.
example_points: Show awareness of total cost in GBP, converted approximate naira amount, and allowance for FX changes.

question_text: Where will you live in the UK, how far is it from your university, and how will you get to campus each day?
intent: Test practical planning about accommodation and transport.
follow_up_hint: Ask if they checked bus or train routes and approximate travel time.
example_points: Name of city/area, distance or travel time to campus, planned transport (bus/train/walking).

question_text: Have you ever applied for a visa to the UK or any other country before? If yes, what happened and why?
intent: Check honesty and explanation of prior refusals.
follow_up_hint: If they mention a refusal, ask what changed since then.
example_points: Country, year, outcome, and a clear explanation of any refusal and what was improved.

question_text: What are your plans after you complete your course, and how will you use your UK qualification when you return to Nigeria?
intent: Confirm intent to return and realistic career path in Nigeria.
follow_up_hint: Ask for specific job roles, sectors, or companies they are targeting.
example_points: Concrete job titles, sectors, and how UK knowledge will apply in Nigerian context.

question_text: What do you understand about the work rules for students on a UK visa during term time?
intent: Verify awareness of work limits and responsibilities.
follow_up_hint: Ask whether they plan to work and how they will balance this with study.
example_points: Mention limited hours, type of permitted work, and priority of studies.
